name.en-US: Little Office of the Blessed Virgin Mary According to the Rite of the Order of Preachers (Dominicans)

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of Blessed Virgin Mary According to the Rite of the Order of Preachers (Dominicans), arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US:
Taken from the Libellus Precum (1952).

Fratribus, Sororibus et Tertiariis, qui Officium quotidianum B. M. V. devote recitaverint, etsi ad illud persolvendum teneantur conceditur: indulgetur 500 dierum pro quolibet hora ejusdem Officii; indulgetur 10 annorum indulgentia pro integro Officio; indulgetur plenaria suetis conditionibus, si quotidie per integrum mensem totius Officii recitationem persolverint.
